assertions.title: Landing page renders at root URL

steps.expected: Page displays with identifiable branding, not blank, no redirect
steps.observed: Page loaded at http://localhost:3000/ with title 't3ingo — Theo Twitch Bingo'. No redirect occurred. Page is not blank.

steps.expected: Title contains 't3ingo' or 'Theo Bingo' or similar
steps.observed: Page title is 't3ingo — Theo Twitch Bingo'

steps.action: Take snapshot of interactive elements on landing page
steps.expected: A 'Play' button (or equivalent CTA) is found among interactive elements
steps.observed: Found button 'Play' [ref=e1] as the only interactive element on the page

steps.expected: Play button is visible in the viewport
steps.observed: Annotated screenshot confirms Play button is visible and rendered on screen

assertions.title: "Play" button navigates to game page with a seed

steps.action: Click the Play button on landing page
steps.expected: Navigates to /game?seed=XXXXX where XXXXX is non-empty alphanumeric

assertions.title: "Play" button generates a different seed on each visit

steps.expected: Navigates to game page with seed A
Navigates to game page with seed B, where B != A

steps.observed: First seed: eeDoIRNO1a, Second seed: BwCm3oceYS — confirmed different

assertions.title: Landing page loads without JavaScript errors

steps.observed: Page loaded successfully with title 't3ingo — Theo Twitch Bingo'
No errors returned from agent-browser errors command — console is clean

assertions.title: Landing page has correct page title

steps.observed: document.title = 't3ingo — Theo Twitch Bingo' — contains both 't3ingo' and 'Bingo'

frictions.description: agent-browser wait --load networkidle timed out (25s) on the landing page, though the page content loaded successfully within seconds. This may be due to hot-reload WebSocket connections from the dev server keeping the network active.
frictions.resolution: Used a fixed wait (2000ms) instead of networkidle, which was sufficient for the page to fully render.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. Landing page renders correctly at root URL with branding 't3ingo — Theo Twitch Bingo', contains a visible Play button, navigates to /game?seed=XXXXX with a non-empty alphanumeric seed, generates different seeds on consecutive clicks, loads without JavaScript errors, and has a correct page title.
